title: ESP32 BLE Room Presence with HomeAssistant
snippet: I have been using HomeAssistant for a couple years now to automate some smalls things in my life. One of the automations was to turn off my PC monitors and office lights when I wasn’t in the room. I started off with a Hue motion sensor which worked well, until I don’t move for a duration of time ...
